title: oudemansia hirsuta
intro: Oudemansia hirsuta is a plant species in the family Myoporaceae, native to New Zealand, and is also known as the hairy oudemansia or hairy myoporum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oudemansia hirsuta include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Oudemansia hirsuta plant can be used to make a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
